name: Coffee Yogurt Shake
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp - Artificial sweetener (equal to 1 tsp sugar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except ice cubes in a blender container.
2. Process the mixture, adding ice cubes one at a time, until smooth.
3. Serve immediately.
Per serving: 44 calories, 2 g. protein, 2 g. fat, 5 g. carbohydrates, 26 mg sodium
SERVINGS: 2
SOURCE: The Weight Watcher's 365 Day Menu Cookbook
